compare-selected-page-range-pdf.title: Compare Selected Page Range of Two PDFs
compare-selected-page-range-pdf.description: Loads two PDF files, sets the start and end pages (using reflection if the properties are unavailable), and compares only that page range, reporting the number of differences per page.

compare-pdf-documents-page-by-page-diff.title: Compare PDF Documents Page by Page and Generate Diff PDF
compare-pdf-documents-page-by-page-diff.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files page by page using Aspose.Pdf's default ComparisonOptions and save the resulting differences as a diff PDF.

compare-specific-pdf-pages.title: Compare Specific PDF Pages Using Aspose.Pdf
compare-specific-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to compare selected pages of two PDFs by passing an array of page numbers, collect text differences, and generate a side‑by‑side visual comparison PDF.

exclude-areas-from-pdf-side-by-side-comp.title: Exclude Areas from PDF Side‑by‑Side Comparison
exclude-areas-from-pdf-side-by-side-comp.description: Demonstrates how to define rectangular regions to exclude from each PDF and run a side‑by‑side comparison using Aspose.Pdf.

exclude-annotations-comparison.title: Exclude Annotations from PDF Comparison
exclude-annotations-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to exclude annotation areas from side‑by‑side PDF comparison by adding their bounding rectangles to the ExcludeAreas collections.

exclude-footer-areas-in-pdf-comparison.title: Exclude Footer Areas in PDF Comparison
exclude-footer-areas-in-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to define rectangular footer regions and set them in SideBySideComparisonOptions to exclude those areas when comparing two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

compare-pdfs-generate-side-by-side-diff.title: Compare PDFs and Generate Side‑by‑Side Difference PDF
compare-pdfs-generate-side-by-side-diff.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's comparison API, retrieve text differences, and create a side‑by‑side PDF that visualizes those differences.

set-custom-tolerance-pdf-image-compariso.title: Set Custom Tolerance for PDF Image Comparison
set-custom-tolerance-pdf-image-compariso.description: Demonstrates how to configure a custom similarity tolerance when comparing PDFs that contain scanned images using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

compare-pdfs-include-form-fields.title: Compare PDFs Including Form Field Values
compare-pdfs-include-form-fields.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf while enabling the IncludeFormFields option so that form field values are part of the diff, and saves a visual comparison PDF.

compare-pdfs-ignore-signature-fields.title: Compare PDFs While Ignoring Signature Fields
compare-pdfs-ignore-signature-fields.description: Shows how to compare two signed PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf and treat digital signature fields as unchanged by excluding their rectangles from the visual diff.

compare-pdfs-different-page-sizes.title: Compare PDFs with Different Page Sizes
compare-pdfs-different-page-sizes.description: Shows how to compare two PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf, automatically resizing pages when their dimensions differ and generating a PDF highlighting the differences.

compare-pdfs-ignoring-compression.title: Compare PDFs Ignoring Compression Differences
compare-pdfs-ignoring-compression.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs that have the same content but different compression settings, ensuring compression does not affect the textual diff results.

compare-unicode-text-pdfs.title: Compare Unicode Text in PDFs with Different Encodings
compare-unicode-text-pdfs.description: Shows how to load two PDF files with different language encodings and use Aspose.Pdf's comparison API to detect Unicode text differences.

compare-pdfs-detect-font-differences.title: Compare PDFs and Detect Font Differences
compare-pdfs-detect-font-differences.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to compare two PDF documents, count font‑related diff operations, and optionally generate a visual diff report.

compare-encrypted-pdfs-side-by-side.title: Compare Encrypted PDFs Side‑by‑Side
compare-encrypted-pdfs-side-by-side.description: Demonstrates how to open two password‑protected PDF files and perform a side‑by‑side visual comparison using Aspose.Pdf, saving the result as a new PDF.

compare-pdfs-memory-stream.title: Compare PDFs from Memory Streams and Output Diff to Memory Stream
compare-pdfs-memory-stream.description: Creates two sample PDFs, loads them from memory streams, compares them graphically, and writes the diff PDF to another memory stream without using temporary files.

compare-pdfs-diff-stream.title: Compare Two PDFs and Write Diff PDF to HTTP Response Stream
compare-pdfs-diff-stream.description: Creates two sample PDFs, compares them, and writes the difference PDF directly to an output stream (e.g., an HTTP response).

generate-visual-diff-pdf.title: Generate Visual Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
generate-visual-diff-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents and create a visual diff PDF with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

generate-pdf-image-differences.title: Generate Image Differences Between Two PDFs
generate-pdf-image-differences.description: Demonstrates how to compare the first pages of two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer, obtain an ImagesDifference object, and save the source, difference, and destination images.

generate-diff-pdf-compare-two-pdfs.title: Generate Diff PDF by Comparing Two PDFs
generate-diff-pdf-compare-two-pdfs.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer and create a highlighted diff PDF saved to a specified folder.

generate-diff-pdf-highlight-color-verifi.title: Generate Diff PDF with Highlighted Text Changes and Verify Default Highlight Color
generate-diff-pdf-highlight-color-verifi.description: This example compares two PDF documents, creates a diff PDF that highlights text differences, and checks that the highlight annotation uses the default red color.

generate-json-diff-report-for-pdf-compar.title: Generate JSON Diff Report for PDF Comparison
generate-json-diff-report-for-pdf-compar.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf and generate a JSON report of the differences using DiffOperation objects.

replace-changed-text-in-pdf.title: Replace Changed Text in PDF Using DiffOperation
replace-changed-text-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs page‑by‑page, extract the original text from differences, and replace the modified page content with the original text.

pdf-comparison-audit-log.title: PDF Comparison Audit Log
pdf-comparison-audit-log.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf, capture each page's diff operations, and write the operation type and page number to a text file for audit purposes.

compare-pdfs-generate-difference-report.title: Compare Two PDFs and Generate a Difference Report
compare-pdfs-generate-difference-report.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's comparison API to perform a flat text comparison between two PDF files and produce a PDF that highlights the differences.

preserve-pdf-metadata-after-comparison.title: Preserve PDF Metadata After Comparison
preserve-pdf-metadata-after-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs side‑by‑side using Aspose.Pdf and then copy all standard and custom metadata from the source document to the generated diff PDF.

multi-threaded-pdf-comparison.title: Multi‑Threaded PDF Comparison with Aspose.Pdf
multi-threaded-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to compare multiple pairs of PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparison API and Task Parallel Library, while handling errors and disposing resources properly.

compare-a-large-batch-of-pdfs-using-para.title: Compare A Large Batch Of Pdfs Using Parallel Processing Limiting Concurrency To Avoid Excessive Memory Consumption

generate-pdf-comparison-images-zip.title: Generate PDF Comparison Images and Zip Them
generate-pdf-comparison-images-zip.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, create visual diff images for each page, and package the images into a ZIP archive for easy distribution.
